# Read Section Information

**Web Service Endpoint**

Get information about the specified section, including its name, its channel, and whether it’s a default section.

## Discussion

A Read Section Information request retrieves information about a single section. A section is a grouping of articles on a particular topic; for example, Sports, Silicon Valley, or Politics.

Every channel has a default section, even if no other sections are defined. See [https://support.apple.com/guide/news-publisher/apdfc6a051aa] in News Publisher User Guide.

### Example



## Sections

- **List All Sections**: See a list of available sections in your channel.
- **Promote Articles in a Section**: Set the list of promoted articles for the specified section.
- **Section**: See the fields the section endpoints returned.
- **SectionLinks**: See the links the section endpoints returned.
- **SectionResponse**: See which objects make up the section response.
- **PromoteArticleRequest**: See the required field for the Promote an Article request.
- **PromoteArticleResponse**: See the field the Promote an Article response returned.
